Class ExpenseController

java.lang.Object
Controllers.ExpenseController
public class ExpenseController extends Object
Controller responsible for processing expense transactions.

Acts as the intermediary between the UI layer and the database/budget logic. Validates expense input, enforces budget rules via BudgetManager, persists approved expenses through TransactionDAO, and provides history and filtering capabilities.

    • transactionDAO

    • budgetController

      private BudgetManager budgetController

  • Constructor Details

    • ExpenseController

      public ExpenseController(TransactionDAO transactionDAO, BudgetManager budgetController)
      Constructs an ExpenseController with explicit DAO and manager dependencies.
      Parameters:
      transactionDAO - the DAO used to persist expense records
      budgetController - the BudgetManager providing budget rules and state

  • Method Details

    • createFor

      public static ExpenseController createFor(BudgetManager budgetManager)
      Factory method that creates an ExpenseController with a default TransactionDAO.
      Parameters:
      budgetManager - the BudgetManager to associate with this controller
      Returns:
      a new ExpenseController instance

    • processExpense

      public ExpenseController.ExpenseResult processExpense(double amount, int category_id, String note)
      Validates and processes a new expense entry.

      Checks that the amount is positive, verifies budget limits, saves the expense to the database, and updates the in-memory budget state.

      Parameters:
      amount - the expense amount (must be greater than 0)
      category_id - the ID of the spending category
      note - an optional description of the expense
      Returns:
      an ExpenseController.ExpenseResult indicating success or the reason for failure

    • loadHistory

      public List<Expense> loadHistory()
      Returns the full expense history for the current budget cycle.
      Returns:
      a list of all Expense objects in the current cycle

    • modifyTransaction

      public boolean modifyTransaction(int id, String action, Expense updatedData)
      Edits or deletes an existing expense transaction by ID.

      After a successful modification, the budget state is reloaded from the database.

      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the expense to modify
      action - the action to perform: "Edit" or "Delete"
      updatedData - the updated Expense data (required for Edit; ignored for Delete)
      Returns:
      true if the operation succeeded; false otherwise

    • filterHistory

      public List<Expense> filterHistory(int categoryID, String startDate, String endDate)
      Returns a filtered list of expenses based on category and date range.
      Parameters:
      categoryID - the category ID to filter by (use 0 or -1 for all categories)
      startDate - the start date string in yyyy-MM-dd format
      endDate - the end date string in yyyy-MM-dd format
      Returns:
      a filtered list of Expense objects matching the criteria
